3.2 What is narrated in the FIR disclosed certain manifest aspects. 
On 25.11.2024 in the morning, the respondent-accused along 
with others went to the house of the appellant and standing 
outside and in front of appellant’s house stated to the appellant 
“Mangtyano, you have become much arrogant, you are staying 
in the village and voting against me”. The appellant was attacked 
with an iron rod. The mother and aunt of the appellant were
